titleStmt.title: SII 24.142: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 142. (A.R. No. 113 of 1938-39.) III PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: Refers to the erosion of the river into the lands belonging to the temples at Śrīraṅgam and Tiruvāṉaikkā and the resettlement of the proper boundaries under arbitration by Aṇṇavāyiluḍaiyār Gāṅgēyarāyar in the 20th year and 213th day of the King, evidently Kulōttuṅga Chōḷa III. After the necessary adjustments, the āḻi (disc) and the śūla (trident) stones were planted demarcating the boundaries.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīḥ .— Aṇṇavāyiluṭaiyār kāṅkeyarāyar Olaikku kalveṭṭu ..kāṅkeyarāyaṉ Olai māḷteva brahmadeyam pāṇṭikulācaṉi vaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭut tiruvaraṅkattu vāriyaṉūṅ karaṇattāṉuṅ kaṇṭu Iṉṉāṭṭu mi koḻai nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiyār tevatāṉabrahmadeyam tiruvāṉaik kāvil Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiyār koyil Ivvūr kuṭiyiruppu nattattukku vaṭa kiḻakkuc cārntu cempiṉ na māyirukkaiyiṉāle cemaṉai paṭi tiruma nta cciṟakiṉ maṉaiyāka Iṭṭu Uṭaiyār vikkirama coḻa tevar tiruviḻāvitiyākac ceyvittaruḷi vikkirama coḻan tiruvitiyil vaṭaciṟa kuṭpaṭṭa viṭṭa Akaḷaṅkanāṭāḻvār Eḻuntaruḷivitta tirukkāmakkoṭṭattup periya nācciyār koyilum tirumatiḷum periya koyilukku vaṭakkup pertaṟuc ceyvitta Oruc ciṟakiṉ maṉaikaḷukku vālniḷam kuṟaivupaṭṭu Āṟu kutti Iṭittaḻivupaṭṭavāṟe niroṭukālile nāṇal naṭṭu koliṭam peṟat tūrpikkap paratta Iṭattu tiru vāṉaikkāvuṭaṉ kūṭṭi Aḷanta pākāciriyamāy niroṭukālil pātiyāṉa teṉpak paṭṭateṉṟum tiruvaraṅkattuṭaṉkūṭi Aḷanta pākāciriyamāṉa niroṭu kālil vaṭapakkattile niroṭukiṟavattaṉaiyeṉṟum Itil kuṟaivupaṭumpaṭi nāṇal naṭal tiruvāṇai maṟuttatāmeṉṟum nāṇal naṭa Oṭṭāte tāṅkaḷ tārkaḷākavum colli tiruvaraṅkattu nilattukkuḷḷe
tiruvāṉaikkāvil nilamāṉa Uṭkiṭai Uṇṭeṉṟum Innilattukkutta tiruvāṉaikkāvil na Uṭkiṭaiyaip paṟṟap paṇṇi Okka niṟuttip pakkañcerttup parivaṟtittup poruntap paṇṇi Ārampūṇṭāṉāṟṟaiyum vaṭakke peṟtu Ellai niṟoṭukālukku kalliviṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiyār koyil naṭuvāka Ikkoyilaic cūḻntu virinta Ūrāya vaṭavā vum niṟuttit tiru viḻāvitikkum kāṇippeṟa veṇumeṉṟu tiruvāṉaikkāvil Ati nampiyum collukaiyāle Ivarkaḷait tiruvaṭit toḻuvittu Ippaṭi viṇṇap pañceyvitta Iṭattu Aḻakiya maṇavāḷar perumāḷkoyil tāṉattāṟkum tiruvaraṅ kattu sabhaikku veṇṭuvāṟkum Aṉniyak kirāmaṅkaḷil veṇṭuvataṟkum porunta Aṉupavappaṭiyum kaṇakkuppaṭiyum nilaṅkalantu kiṭakkum Uṭkiṭaiyuḷavākil tiruvāṉaikkāvil nilattile paṟṟi tiruvaraṅkattu nilattile viṭṭu nilattukku Okkap pakkañcera niṟuttip parivaṟtittut tiruvāṉaikkāk kuṭiyiruppu nattamāka vāy Iṭukiṟa Iṭam Ellaikku veṇṭumaḷavile Āṟupeṟtu kalliviṭṭut tiruvāṉaikkā vuṭaiyār koyil naṭuvākak koṇṭu vāstu vakuttukkuṭiyeṟavum paṇṇit tiru varaṅkamum Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷ koyil naṭuvākak koṇṭu vāstu vakuttuk kuṭiyeṟṟumiṭattu Āṟupeṟkaveṇṭumiṭamuṇṭākilum kki viṭṭu Āṟṟil tūṟkaveṇṭumiṭamum tūṟtut tevatā
ṉaṅkaḷiṟ parivaṟtikka veṇṭuvatuvum parivaṟtittuk koyilaic cūḻak kuṭiyiruppu nattamāka vakuttu ñceytu tiruviti maṉaikaḷ māṭañ ceyyappaṇṇi Oru talaiyiṟ cārvu paṭāme naṭuvākac ceytu kuṭuppateṉṟu tiruvāy moḻintaruḷukaiyāle puravuvarikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum puravuvarināyakañ ceyvārkaḷum Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷ koyilukkum samaiyat tukkum veṇṭu k kāvuṭaiya kkum stīśvara samaiyattukkum veṇṭuvāraiyun taṅkaḷurar sabhaikku veṇṭuvāraiyum Iraṇṭur Ūṟakaṇakkaraiyum Iraṇṭu koviṟ kaṇakkar kaṇkāṇikkaṇakkaraiyuṅ koṇṭu pattoṉpatāvatu pa ppaṭi Iruntapaṭi viṭattut tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiyār koyilai yaṇaiya vaṭavarukil niroṭukālum vaṭṭakkattut tirukkāḷiśvaramuṭaiyār koyilun tirunantavaṉamum Ivviṭattukku meṟkum vaṭakkuṅ kiḻakkun tiruvaraṅkattu nilamāyt tiruvaraṅkattut taṇṭalaip paṟṟil vaṭa ccarāka karumāṇik kāḻvārāṉa veḷḷait tirumuṟṟat tāḻvār koyilun tiṟttakkuḷamum Ikkoyilukkut tenpakkattut toṭṭaṅkaḷukkut teṟkum mel pakkattut toṭṭaṅkaḷukku meṟkuñ ci tiruvāṉaikkāvukku nilamāyum niroṭu kālāṉa vitu tiruvula
kaḷanta kaṇakkiṟ kāveri niroṭu kāleṉṟu peciṉa vattaṉaiyallatu Ārampūṇṭāṉe vum vāṟṟiṟ pākāśrayamāṉa pātiyāyk kūṭṭi yaḷanta niroṭukāṟ prāpti taṅkaḷurkaḷiṟ kaṇakkile māṟākapperkaḷiṭṭuc cila vaḻaṅkiṉa paṭiyumāyi taṭaiyil Aḷavu cāttuppaṭiyaḷantu Uḷkaṇṭu parivartikkap pāṟciṟ tiruvāṉaikkāvukkuk kiḻiyalā kaṇṇāṟu kaiyāle Aḷavu cāttuppaṭiye yaḷantu puḷḷipaṭi koḷḷavum muṉṉāḷil viṭutala ceyyaveṇṭum nilatti leṟṟac curukka muṇṭāmavai curukkamā mat taṉaiyākaiyālum Appaṭi vanta nilam Annā peṟṟu ṭutal ceyyavum Ippotu Aṉupavappaṭi koṇṭu parivaṟtittu Āṟuṅkalliviṭṭu Ūruṅ kuṭiyeṟṟi viṭavum pāṟtu Aṉupavippak koṇṭu Ūr kaṇṭa viṭattut tirukkāḷiśvaramuṭaiyār koyilun tirunantavaṉamum Ikkoyilukkut teṟku niroṭu kālumāyt tiruvaraṅkattuṭaṉ kaiyyakappa Aḷanta nilamum Aḷainta koḷariyum śrīvilliputtūrun tiruvāyal tuṟantāṉum Aḷainta koḷari viḷākamum Uḷḷiṭṭu Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷapperumāḷ tirunantavaṉamāṉa nilaṅkaḷ tirunantavaṉamāṉa paṭiyuṅ koyiṟ toṭṭaṅ ttu nilamāṉa paṭiyun tavirntu niroṭukālun
tūṟṟut tiruvāṉaikkāk kuṭiyiruppup pakkamāy Ivvūṟku nilamākavum veḷḷait tirumuṟṟattāḻvār koyilun tirttakkuḷamun teṉpakkattuṇṭāṉa toṭṭamum mel pakkattu Aritalaikkuṭaiyeṉṉūn toṭṭamun tiruvāṉaikkāvukku nilamāṉa paṭiyun tevaṟkut tirunantavaṉamāṉapaṭiyun taviṟtu Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷukkut tiruntavaṉamuṅ koyiṟ toppāy kuṭippaṟṟum muḷḷiṭṭut tiruvaraṅkattu nilamākavum veṇṭukaiyil veḷḷait tirumuṟṟattāḻvār koyilun tirttak kuḷamuṅ teṟkum meṟkum Aritalaikkuṟai Uṭpaṭṭa toṭṭaṅkaḷuṅ tiruvāṉaikkāvukku mutalāṉapaṭi kaṇakkiṟ kaḻittut tiruvaraṅkattu Aḷavil mutalāṉa nilattuṭaṉe kūṭṭi Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷukkut tirunantavaṉamākavum Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷ tirunantavaṉamāṉa Aḷainta koḷariyun tiruvāyal tiṟantāṉum villipputtūru muḷḷiṭṭa nilaṅkaḷ tiruvaraṅkattu nilamāṉa pun tirunantavaṉamāṉapaṭiyun tavintu kaṇakkiluṅ kaḻittut tiruvāṉaikkāvukku vaṭa pakkattuk kuṭiyiruppu nattamun tiruviḻāvitiyun tirunantavaṉamumāyt tiruvāṉaikkā Aṭuttu tokaippaṭṭa nilattuk kuṭalāyk kuṭiyiruppu nattamāṉa taramiliyile vāṅki Iṟaiyili nattamākki niṟuttavun tiruvaraṅkattu nilattuṭaṉ tokai koṇṭu niroṭukālāka vāṅkiṉa nilattukku kuṭiyiruppu nattam paṭṭa niroṭukālun tiruvaraṅkattu nilattiṟ kaḻittut
tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaṉ kūṭṭi niroṭukālāṉa paṭi taviṟtup puḻaikkaṭai vālniḷamākat tūrvaip paṭavum Ippaṭikaḷāl Aṉupavappaṭi nilattukku Okkappakkañcera niṟutti Uḷḷa nattattukku veṇṭumiṭattile Āṟuvilakki vaṭakku nokki c ciṟṟāṟeṉṉum niroṭukālākak kallik kiḻakku nokkip purintu pokaviṭṭu Ivvāṟṟile talaipeṟṟu vaṭakku nokki veḷḷait tirumuṟṟat tāḻvār tirttak kuḷattileviya Ellai niroṭukālāy Irājanārāyaṇacca nirvaḻaṅkak kalliviṭavum Ivvellaikku meṟkuṅ kiḻakkum Uḷḷa nilam Aḷavu cāttuppaṭi koṇṭu Ūraṭaṅka Aḷantu Okka kaṇṭāṟ parivaṟtaṉaittiṭṭiṟ peciṉa nilattukku yeṟṟac curukkap paṭṭiruntatuṉ kālkaḷ nirnilaikaḷ Uṭpaṭa viṭutal paṟṟutal ceyyaveṇṭum nilan tirttakkuḷattukku vaṭakku vaṭavāṟṟaṅ karaiyuṟappakka tti viṭutal paṟṟutal ceyyavun tirttakkuḷattut tenkarai kiḻ talai tuṭaṅkit teṟku nokki Irājanārāyaṇa ciṟṟāṟeṉṟu kallum niroṭu kāṟ talaipeṟṟaviṭattilum Itaṉ teṉ meṟkut tiripuvaṉavira ciṟṟāṟu Eṉṟu kallum niroṭu koliṟ talaipeṟṟaviṭattilum mel karaiyile tiruvāḻikkallum kiḻkaraiyile tiruccūlakkallum nāṭṭiyum Ivvellai kaḷiluḷḷuppuṟavūṟku nā ṉa jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻaṉ vāykkāl nīr vaḻaṅkātu tūrntu payiṟceytu varukaiyil
putitāka vellai niroṭu kālākak kallum Āṟṟukku meṟkuppaṭṭa jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻaṉ vāykkāṟtūrvai tām pūṇṭu Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷap perumāḷukkut tirunāmattuk kāṇiyākap payiṟceytu koḷḷavum Ellai niroṭu kālukkuk kiḻakku jayaṅ ḻaṉ vāykkāṟ tūrvaiyāluḷḷa nilan tiruvāṉaik kāvuṭaiyāṟkut tirunāmattukkāṇiyāy tarampūṭṭi payiṟceytu koḷḷap peṟavum Ivvāykkāl kalli nir vaḻaṅkak koṭupokap prāpti Uṭai tilic caruppetimaṅkalattār koḷḷap peṟātaārkaḷākavum parivaṟtittup pakkañ cera niṟutti Ellaikkallum nāṭṭi Ellai niroṭu kālākak kalliviṭun tiripuvaṉavirac ciṟṟāṟṟilum Irājanārāyaṇac ciṟṟāṟṟilum vāṭaṟuttuk kiḻpoki paṭuttal mitoṭi yaṭukki neṭuṅkāl nāṭṭip pāvi viṭutal pattal vaittukkoṭu potal Uḷḷiṭṭa ni vaḻakkam Iraṇṭuṟkuṅ kaṭavatallavākavum Ivvāṟukaḷiṟ taṅkaḷ Ellaikaḷile Ettamum Ivūr nilaikaḷum Iṭṭu Iṟaikkum prāpti Uṭaiyarāyp potu vāṉa vāṟāy niroṭukāl Iraṇṭuṟkum Ivvāṟṟaṅkaraikaḷ Aṭaiyāte Oru kol Akalattup peru vaḻiyāka vaḻaṅkavum Ūr nattam vaṭakkum meṟkum variyaveṇṭum Ellaikku Āṟu tūṟtu veṟuka ttāṟāṉa tiripuvaṉaviracciṟṟāṟṟukku meṟkuḷḷa niroṭu kāl Aḷavu
cāttil Aḷantu nikkiṉa Akalam nirvaḻaṅkak kallikkaraittu viṭavum In niroṭukāl ceṟuttu nāṇal naṭṭup paṭukaiyūrkkipRead yākkipayiṟ ceyyap peṟātoḻiya vum Inniroṭu kālukkut teṟkun teṉṉāṟṟukku vaṭakku tiruvāṉaik kāvuṭaiyār vāy t tirunantavaṉattu mipālellai yaṟutikku meṟku niroṭu kāluṭpaṭa Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷukkut tirunantavaṉamāṉa kuṟaivaṟakkuṭutta coḻaṉ tirunantavaṉattuk kiḻpakkattu niroṭukāl m Ellaip peruvaḻiyāka vaḻaṅkuvu teṉṟu �r Olai kuṭuttu viṭuvitta peruvaḻi Ivarolaippaṭiye peruvaḻiyāy vaḻaṅkavum tiruvāṉaikkāvuṭaiyār koyil naṭuvāka Uḷḷa niṟuttik kuṭiyeṟi Ippaṭi parivaṟtittut tiruvaraṅkattār poruntac ceyta paṭiye tiruvāṉaikkāvāruntiruccirāppaḷḷiyārun tiruvaraṅkat ṉṟu Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷ koyil naṭuvākat tiruvaraṅkam vāstu niṟuttik kuṭiyeṟṟu miṭattu teṉ meṟku cirāt teṉṉāṟṟil ni tiruccirāppaḷḷiyuṭaiyār tevatāṉam Ālaṅkuṭiyil viṭaveṇṭum nilan tiruvaraṅkattukku Uṭalāka viṭṭu viṭṭa nilattukkut talaimāṟu koṭa tiṭṭaiyil Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷ tirunāmattuk kāṇiyile paṟṟip parivaṟtaṉai paṇṇak kaṭavarkaḷākavum Ip
parivaṟtaṉaikkup poruntāmai coṉṉāruḷarākiṟ turokikaḷ paṭṭatu paṭakkaṭavarkaḷākavum Ippaṭikkuk kalveṭṭikkoḷḷap peṟavum Irupatāvatu nāḷ Irunūṟṟorupattu muṉṟiṉāl niṉaip piṭuvittut tirukkatavuṭaiyāṉ nampiyoṭu veṇṭuvāraip potak kāṭṭittu tāṅkaḷuṅkūṭa niṉṟu Ippaṭi ceyyappaṇṇuvate Ivai kāṅkeyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu �— svastiśrī .
Digital edition of SII 24.142 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
